title: A Busy School Day
subtitle: 水水充实又快乐的幼儿园一日生活
theme: 幼儿园一日生活、自理能力、合作玩耍与温暖告别
moral: 水水发现，自己能起床、喝水、午睡，也能和老师、小朋友一起完成很多快乐的小事。

pages.narration: 清晨，太阳公公照进房间。水水和妈妈睡在同一张大床上，水水穿着短袖长睡衣醒来，伸了一个大大的懒腰。
pages.composition_hint: a warm three-quarter medium view inside a cozy bedroom in morning sunlight: shuishui and the adult white rabbit share the SAME large bed under soft blankets, both clearly wearing soft pajamas instead of their usual outfits; shuishui wears short-sleeve long pajamas and stretches beside the adult white rabbit; the adult white rabbit is lying/sitting on the bed cuddling shuishui with a warm smile, NOT standing beside the bed; intimate eye-level family morning moment, both faces visible

pages.narration: 水水自己下了床，啪嗒啪嗒跑到爸爸房间门口。她“duang”地推开门，声音响亮极了。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front view of shuishui wearing short-sleeve long pajamas instead of usual outfit pushing open a bedroom door, red panda wearing loose pajamas instead of usual outfit sitting up in bed with an exaggerated surprised face, shuishui laughing proudly

pages.narration: 洗漱以后，妈妈帮水水换上漂亮的裙子和小鞋子。水水从一排毛绒玩具里，选中了小橘猫。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up of shuishui in a pretty school dress, shoes, and hairband holding an orange cat plush toy, white rabbit beside her holding a water bottle, a sofa back lined with plush toys in the background

pages.narration: 今天是爸爸送水水去幼儿园。小摩托轻轻向前，早上的风也轻轻吹。
pages.composition_hint: a clear three-quarter side view of a gentle pastel step-through scooter / underbone motorbike on a sunny morning road: the scooter has a low curved step-through frame with a small FRONT child seat mounted in the middle footboard area, in front of the driver and behind the handlebars; red panda sits on the normal rear driver seat holding the handlebars; shuishui sits safely on the added front child seat between the red panda and the handlebars, NOT on the rear seat, NOT side-by-side, NOT in a sidecar; shuishui holds an orange cat plush toy and water bottle, both smiling in the morning breeze

pages.narration: 很快，幼儿园到了。王老师在班级门口值班，笑眯眯地迎接大家。

dialogue.speaker: wang_teacher
dialogue.text: 水水，早上好，我们量一量体温，看一看小牙齿。

pages.composition_hint: an over-the-shoulder view from the side of red panda, showing a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses holding a forehead thermometer near shuishui's forehead and a small flashlight for checking teeth, red panda stands aside waving goodbye and NOT doing the teacher action, shuishui smiles at the classroom doorway

pages.narration: 章老师推着早餐车来了，香香的味道跑进了教室。花卷、鸡蛋、粥和小煎饼，都在向大家打招呼。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front view of a cheerful DALMATIAN dog teacher pushing a breakfast cart with steamed buns, eggs, minced-meat cabbage porridge, and small pancakes, shuishui in school dress watching happily, a small fawn classmate and a small elephant calf classmate seated nearby

pages.narration: 小朋友们坐好，一口一口吃早餐。水水也自己拿勺子，吃得香喷喷。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up of shuishui holding a small spoon and eating breakfast at a low classroom table, a small fawn classmate, a small elephant calf classmate, and a small white kitten classmate eating happily beside her

pages.narration: 早餐后，游戏时间开始啦。水水和果儿、十一一起拼磁力片，搭出一座高高的冰雪城堡。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui, a small fawn classmate, and a small elephant calf classmate sitting around colorful magnetic tiles, cooperating to build a tall icy-blue castle with shiny triangular roofs on a soft play mat

pages.narration: 玩了一会儿，王老师拿出一本故事书。大家围成一个圆圈，耳朵都竖起来听。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter wide view of a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses holding a picture book at the front of a circle, shuishui, a small fawn classmate, a small elephant calf classmate, a small white kitten classmate, a small squirrel classmate, and a small piglet classmate sitting on a round rug listening

pages.narration: 上午休息时间到了，章老师又推来了酸奶车。小朋友们排成一队，一人一盒。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of a DALMATIAN dog teacher handing out yogurt boxes from a small cart, shuishui waiting in line with a small white kitten classmate, a small squirrel classmate, and a small duckling classmate behind her

pages.narration: 水水和毛毛西坐在一起，咕噜咕噜喝酸奶。两只小脑袋凑着笑，酸奶甜，笑声也甜。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close-up of shuishui and a small white kitten classmate seated side by side at a small table, each holding a yogurt box with a straw, both laughing with tiny yogurt mustaches

pages.narration: 喝完酸奶，刘老师来了。大家排成两队，手牵手，一起去操场。

dialogue.speaker: liu_teacher
dialogue.text: 我们慢慢走，去晒太阳喽。

pages.composition_hint: from behind: a GIRAFFE teacher with no glasses leads two neat lines of animal classmates toward a sunny playground doorway, shuishui holds hands with a small white kitten classmate, a small raccoon classmate and a small bear cub classmate walk in the line ahead

pages.narration: 操场上真热闹！有的滑滑梯，有的拍球，有的滚轮胎。水水和毛毛西坐上翘翘板，一上一下，咯咯笑。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui and a small white kitten classmate playing on a colorful seesaw, a GIRAFFE teacher with no glasses watching nearby, a small fox classmate rolls a black rubber tire, a small hedgehog classmate bounces a ball, and a small duckling classmate slides down a bright plastic slide in the background

pages.narration: 玩了一会儿，水水有点渴了。她回到班里，自己找到水杯，咕咚咚喝了好几口。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我会自己喝水，身体就有力气啦。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up of shuishui standing by the classroom cubby shelf, proudly holding her own water bottle with both paws and drinking several big gulps; the orange cat plush rests nearby on the shelf; bright classroom background softly blurred, focus on the self-care moment and shuishui's happy face

pages.narration: 中午到了，章老师送来午餐。红薯米饭、红烧丸子、鸡蛋炒莴笋、冬瓜汤，摆满了小餐桌。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view of a DALMATIAN dog teacher serving lunch from a cart, shuishui seated at a low table with a small fawn classmate, a small elephant calf classmate, and a small white kitten classmate, plates showing sweet potato rice, braised meatballs, scrambled egg with lettuce stems, and winter melon soup

pages.narration: 吃完饭，王老师说：“准备睡觉啦。”午睡房里，一排一排小床整整齐齐，水水爬上自己的小床，咕噜噜滚了几下。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of a calm nap room with rows of small nap beds, shuishui climbing onto her own bed and rolling happily once, a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses standing nearby, a small squirrel classmate and a small piglet classmate settling into separate beds

pages.narration: 水水盖上小被子，闭上眼睛，没一会儿就睡着了。王老师轻轻走来，帮她把被角拉好，眼睛里都是表扬。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close-up of shuishui asleep in her own small nap bed, tucked under a soft blanket, a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses standing beside the bed gently adjusting the blanket, warm approving eyes, quiet rows of beds softly blurred behind

pages.narration: 午睡结束，轻柔的音乐响起来。小朋友们伸伸胳膊，伸伸腿，像一朵朵小花慢慢醒来。

dialogue.speaker: wang_teacher
dialogue.text: 醒醒啦，下午也会很好玩。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui sitting up on her nap bed and stretching, a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses near a small music player, a small white kitten classmate and a small bear cub classmate waking in their own beds

pages.narration: 章老师准备了水果。水水吃了几颗葡萄，甜甜的汁水在嘴巴里转圈圈。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up of shuishui holding a small fork with grapes on a plate, smiling at the sweet taste, a DALMATIAN dog teacher standing by a fruit cart with more fruit plates

pages.narration: 下午的游戏最搞笑！水水戴上西瓜头套，别的小动物戴着草莓、苹果、南瓜和香蕉头套，大家笑得前仰后合。
pages.composition_hint: a wide three-quarter eye-level classroom play area full of laughing animal classmates: shuishui wears a watermelon headpiece; a small fawn wears a strawberry headpiece, a small elephant calf wears an apple headpiece, a white kitten wears a pumpkin headpiece, and other small animal classmates wear banana and other fruit headpieces; everyone laughing so hard, silly bright afternoon game, faces clearly visible

pages.narration: 快乐的时间过得真快，放学到了。水水跟着王老师来到校门口，一眼就看见爸爸在等她，旁边还有姥姥！

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 我们的小水水，今天真棒。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view at the kindergarten gate, shuishui waving happily while standing beside a GIANT PANDA teacher with no glasses, red panda waiting with a smile and sheep standing beside red panda, a small squirrel classmate and a small duckling classmate leaving in the background

pages.narration: 水水和爸爸坐上小摩托，带着小橘猫和水杯回家。今天的幼儿园又香、又甜、又好玩，明天还要来！

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 今天最开心的事是什么？

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 好多好多！明天我还要去幼儿园！

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide shot from across the street at a city intersection crosswalk, like a camera on the opposite sidewalk watching a gentle pastel step-through scooter crossing the road slowly. red panda rides the scooter, sitting on the normal driver saddle with both paws on the handlebars, smiling with happy crescent-shaped squinting eyes. shuishui stands safely on the scooter's wide flat front footboard / floorboard area in front of the red panda and below the handlebars, holding an orange cat plush toy and water bottle close, smiling with happy crescent-shaped squinting eyes; shuishui is standing on the footboard, NOT sitting on the rear seat, NOT sitting on the handlebars, NOT in a sidecar. Show the scooter in side view as it crosses the zebra crossing at the intersection, traffic lights and crosswalk lines visible, warm late-afternoon light, joyful going-home ending, both faces visible and very happy.
